name: Tidelands Royalty Trust B
summary: Tidelands Royalty Trust 'B' engages in the administration and collection of oil and natural gas royalties in the United States. The company, through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Tidelands Royalty 'B' Corporation, holds title to interests in properties situated offshore of Louisiana. As of March 1, 2018, it had an overriding royalty interest in four oil and natural gas leases covering 17,188 gross acres in the Gulf of Mexico in the Sabine Pass and West Cameron areas. The company was founded in 1954 and is based in Dallas, Texas.
